title: Caregiver Time Commitment Calculator
summary: Caregiving hours add up in ways that are easy to lose track of — this adds them up for you.

fields.label: Personal care
fields.hint: Bathing, dressing, feeding, help with mobility

fields.label: Household tasks
fields.hint: Cooking, cleaning, laundry, shopping done for or with them

fields.label: Medical & appointments
fields.hint: Driving to appointments, managing medications, calls with doctors or insurance

fields.label: Coordination & paperwork
fields.hint: Bills, scheduling, paperwork, communicating with family or providers

fields.label: Companionship & supervision
fields.hint: Being present, emotional support, safety supervision

disclaimer: This is a rough estimate to help make an often-invisible workload more visible — not a judgment about whether your hours are "too many" or "not enough." Every family's situation is different.
